title: papaver × cookei
intro: Papaver × cookei, also known as the California poppy tree or California golden poppy tree, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Papaver genus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been known to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, due to its alkaloid content. Herbal preparations of Papaver × cookei, including teas and tinctures, have been used to treat a range of ailments, including insomnia and digestive issues.
